name: Credit Human | 211 and Potranco Financial Health Center
description_short: Credit Human is a credit union offering retail banking services including accounts, loans, and financial services through multiple locations, including the 211 and Potranco Financial Health Center branch in San Antonio.
description_long:
Credit Human operates as a financial institution providing comprehensive banking services to members in the San Antonio area. The organization maintains multiple physical locations, including the 211 and Potranco Financial Health Center branch situated at 14317 Potranco Rd, Suite 202, in San Antonio, Texas. This branch represents part of Credit Human's broader network of service centers designed to serve the local community.

The 211 and Potranco location offers standard credit union banking services including account opening, loan products with published rates, and loan payment setup. The branch provides in-person banking during extended hours, with lobby access Monday through Thursday from 9 am to 5 pm, Friday from 9 am to 6 pm, and Saturday from 9 am to noon. Members can access additional support through a dedicated Member Service Center available Monday through Friday from 7 am to 7 pm and Saturday from 9 am to noon CT.

The branch distinguishes itself through bilingual service offerings (Se Habla Español), notary services, and ATM access. The facility also operates on Saturdays, providing weekend banking access that many traditional banks do not offer. Credit Human maintains a dedicated customer support infrastructure with multiple contact methods, including phone lines at (210) 258-1234 and a toll-free number at 800-688-7228, plus online FAQ resources for after-hours assistance.

As a credit union branch location, Credit Human offers member-focused banking rather than consumer lending services. The company's website emphasizes loan rates and account products without specific promotional offers or specialized lending programs visible at this location. Prospective members should note that membership eligibility may apply for credit union products, and services are limited to what the physical branch location provides rather than comprehensive digital banking solutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 14317 Potranco Rd Suite 202, San Antonio, TX 78253

company_info.headquarters: 14317 Potranco Rd Suite 202, San Antonio, TX 78253

pros: Extended Saturday hours (9 am to noon) providing weekend banking access
Bilingual service staff with Spanish language support (Se Habla Español)
Notary service available at the branch location
Multiple contact methods including toll-free support line and online FAQ resources
Member Service Center with extended weekday hours (7 am to 7 pm Monday-Friday)
On-site ATM access at the branch location
Appointment booking available for personalized service
cons: Limited lobby hours with early 5 pm weekday closing (except Friday at 6 pm) may not suit working professionals
Credit union membership requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks
Website provides limited transparency about specific loan rates, APRs, or account terms
No indication of digital banking capabilities or online account management features
Single branch location information displayed; full service offerings may vary by location
best_for: San Antonio residents seeking convenient weekend banking with Saturday hours
Spanish-speaking consumers preferring bilingual financial services
Members needing notary services combined with banking access in one location
Credit union members already affiliated with Credit Human seeking accessible local branch services
diagnosis: This location is best for existing or prospective Credit Human credit union members in San Antonio seeking in-person banking services, particularly those who value weekend access and bilingual support. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements typically apply to credit unions, and the website lacks detailed information about loan rates, account fees, or the full range of products available—interested consumers should contact the branch directly or visit the main website for comprehensive product details.
services: Account opening and new account setup
Loan products with available rate information
Member service support via phone and online
In-person banking at physical branch location
